title: weave_composition_output_v1
description: Output row schema emitted per trial by weave_compose() in _python_bridge/module/weave_composition.py. Co-located with witness schema raw_77_weave_compose_v1 (state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl). See .roadmap.weave §Falsifier preregister W-R1 and GATE-26-3.

target.description: C2 16-cell matrix disease class (W·α=aml, W·β=scd, W·γ=pancov, W·δ=senolytic).

secondary.description: DSSP-like per-residue secondary-structure string (length should match sequence length when supplied).

disulfides.description: Pairs of 0-indexed cysteine residue positions forming disulfide bonds.

margin_kT.description: heat_budget_kT minus heat_consumed_kT; sign matches `pass` field.

pi_p2_verifier.description: Identifier of the Π^p_2 verifier implementation used for this row.

pi11_ca0.description: Π¹₁-CA₀ closure cert reference. For v1.x.x this is the MVP-caveat disclosure surrogate (e.g. `raw_91_c3_disclose:MVP_caveat`); full machine-checked cert deferred to v2.0.0 (GATE-26-2).

ref_witness.description: Pointer into state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl raw_77_weave_compose_v1 (or coverage/baseline extensions).
